title: erucastrum arabicum var. schimperi
intro: Erucastrum arabicum var. schimperi, also known as wild rocket or Arab rocket, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erucastrum arabicum var. schimperi include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or topical cream, and is also used in herbal supplements and food products.
